Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
// Exports the contents of a grid (using the selected order and filters) to a PDF file. LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context)
Do 'LoadGridState'
&Title = "Listagem Certificados"
//Report Template Source Header if &Context.EmpCod = 0 loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Endif
For Each ORder EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod &AppName = FilFan
&AddressLine1 = &Today.ToFormattedString() + ' ' + &Time.Trim() //FilLogNro.Trim() + ' - ' + FilBai.Trim() + ', '+ FilCidCodNomUfe.Trim()
&AddressLine2 = FilFonNum.Trim() if not FilEml.IsEmpty() if not &AddressLine2.IsEmpty() &AddressLine2 += ' / ' Endif &AddressLine2 += FilEml.Trim() Endif Exit EndFor
Print printTitle End
Do 'PrintFilters'
Do 'PrintColumnTitles'
Do 'PrintData'
Do 'PrintFooter'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Sub 'PrintFilters'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If not &PesTip.IsEmpty() &FilterPesTipValueDescription = &PesTip.EnumerationDescription()
print printBlockFilterPesTip EndIf If not &PesAviCer.IsEmpty() &FilterPesAviCerValueDescription = &PesAviCer.EnumerationDescription()
print printBlockFilterPesAviCer EndIf If not &FiltroPesRaz.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterFiltroPesRaz EndIf If not &PesCod.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterPesCod EndIf If not &PesDtaVctCer.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterPesDtaVctCer EndIf If not &PesDtaVctCer_To.IsEmpty() &PesDtaVctCer_To_Description = format('%1 (%2)', "Vct.", "à") print printBlockFilterPesDtaVctCer_To EndIf If not &MesPesDtaVctCer.IsEmpty() &FilterMesPesDtaVctCerValueDescription = '' Do Case Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 1 &FilterMesPesDtaVctCerValueDescription = "Janeiro"
Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 2 &FilterMesPesDtaVctCerValueDescription = "Fevereiro"
Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 3 &FilterMesPesDtaVctCerValueDescription = "Março"
Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 4 &FilterMesPesDtaVctCerValueDescription = "Abril"
Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 5 &FilterMesPesDtaVctCerValueDescription = "Maio"
Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 6 &FilterMesPesDtaVctCerValueDescription = "Junho"
Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 7 &FilterMesPesDtaVctCerValueDescription = "Julho"
Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 8 &FilterMesPesDtaVctCerValueDescription = "Agosto"
Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 9 &FilterMesPesDtaVctCerValueDescription = "Setembro"
Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 10 &FilterMesPesDtaVctCerValueDescription = "Outubro"
Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 11 &FilterMesPesDtaVctCerValueDescription = "Novembro"
Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 12 &FilterMesPesDtaVctCerValueDescription = "Dezembro"
EndCase
print printBlockFilterMesPesDtaVctCer EndIf If not &PesSts.IsEmpty() &FilterPesStsValueDescription = &PesSts.EnumerationDescription()
print printBlockFilterPesSts EndIf If not &PesIsCli.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterPesIsCli EndIf If not &PesEscCtbCod.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterPesEscCtbCod EndIf If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCpf1.IsEmpty() &PesCpf = &PesCpf1 print printBlockFilterPesCpf EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesFan1.IsEmpty() &PesFan = &PesFan1 print printBlockFilterPesFan EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCpf2.IsEmpty() &PesCpf = &PesCpf2 print printBlockFilterPesCpf EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesFan2.IsEmpty() &PesFan = &PesFan2 print printBlockFilterPesFan EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 3 &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCpf3.IsEmpty() &PesCpf = &PesCpf3 print printBlockFilterPesCpf EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesFan3.IsEmpty() &PesFan = &PesFan3 print printBlockFilterPesFan EndIf EndCase EndIf EndIf EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'PrintColumnTitles'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
print printBlockBeforeGrid print printBlockLines_titles
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'PrintData'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
For each order EmpCod (PesTip) PesDtaVctCer (PesEscCtbCod) PesRaz when &OrderedBy = 1 order PesDtaVctCer when &OrderedBy = 2 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (PesDtaVctCer) when &OrderedBy = 2 AND &OrderedDsc = True order PesEscCtbCod when &OrderedBy = 3 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (PesEscCtbCod) when &OrderedBy = 3 AND &OrderedDsc = True
using DSwpMonitoraCertificados(&PesTip, &PesAviCer, &FiltroPesRaz, &PesCod, &PesDtaVctCer, &PesDtaVctCer_To , &MesPesDtaVctCer, &PesSts, &PesIsCli, &PesEscCtbCod, &DynamicFiltersSelector1, &PesCpf1 , &PesFan1, &DynamicFiltersEnabled2, &DynamicFiltersSelector2, &PesCpf2, &PesFan2, &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 , &DynamicFiltersSelector3, &PesCpf3, &PesFan3) &gridPesRaz = PesCodRaz if PesCodRaz.Length() > 30 &gridPesRaz = substr(PesCodRaz,1,30)+ '...' Endif
If PesTip = 'J' //JURIDICA &CpfCnpj = PesCnpj Else &CpfCnpj = PesCpf EndIF
&gridPesCidNom = PesCidUfeCod.Trim() +' / '+ PesCidNom.Trim()
Do Case CAse PesAviCer = Status_SimNao.Nao &AuxPesAvisar = 'NÃO' CAse PesAviCer = Status_SimNao.Sim &AuxPesAvisar = 'SIM' Otherwise &AuxPesAvisar = '???' EndCase
RetornaAdministradores.call(EmpCod,PesCod,&Adms)
Do 'BeforePrintLine' print printBlockLines_data Do 'AfterPrintLine' EndFor
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'LoadGridState'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
// Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(!"wpMonitoraCertificadosGridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(!"wpMonitoraCertificadosGridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(!"wpMonitoraCertificadosGridState")) Endif
&OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc
For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESTIP" &PesTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESAVICER" &PesAviCer.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILTROPESRAZ" &FiltroPesRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESCOD" &PesCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESDTAVCTCER" &PesDtaVctCer.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &PesDtaVctCer_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"MESPESDTAVCTCER" &MesPesDtaVctCer.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESSTS" &PesSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESISCLI" &PesIsCli.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESESCCTBCOD" &PesEscCtbCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'BeforePrintLine'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'AfterPrintLine'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'PrintFooter'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
